goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'spanish' food and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve spanish food and should be in the cheap price range
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
